title: Infosys Receives Singapore GST Penalty Order
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore for collection of a penalty totaling SGD 97,035.90. The penalty pertains to Singapore GST payment for the period April 2025 to June 2025. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a penalty from the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore.
The total penalty is SGD 97,035.90/- and pertains to Singapore GST payment for the period April 2025 to June 2025.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty pertaining to Singapore GST payment for the period April 2025 to June 2025.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the penalty amount disclosed by Infosys.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports Infosys's stated assessment of business and financial impact.

sample_questions: What penalty did Infosys receive from the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore?
